_comment: Override for TANUH's MViT2 oral-cancer model (mvit2_fold5_2_latest_traced.pt). Captures the exact preprocessing math from the AI team's PoC at ~/IdeaProjects/aiapp (MainActivity.kt:146-211) so on-device inference is bit-for-bit identical to what was clinically validated. Plugin definitions: preprocessing/Preprocessors.kt → MeanTargetBgrRoundedPreprocessor; decoding/Decoders.kt → SigmoidBinaryDecoder.
